name: Pumpkin Mousse Pie
recipeInstructions:
1. Prepare the pie filling according to package directions using 3/4 cup of cold milk.
2. Blend in the solid-pack pumpkin, pumpkin pie spice, and 2 cups of Cool Whip.
3. Spoon the mixture into the prepared pie shell.
4. Chill the pie for at least 4 hours.
5. Spread any remaining Cool Whip over the top of the chilled filling.
Note: For variety, add 2/3 cup each of pecans and chocolate chips to the mixture before spooning it into the pie shell. Store leftover pie in the refrigerator.
